summary: Visible problem is a budget overrun after an incident response shock. The obvious proposed route is an invoice-only fix. But leakage is still active (continued optional spend from the contingency buffer). System must detect that closing the symptom while leakage continues is not stable repair — leakage-first route is required.
claim_attempt: Invoice-only containment is proposed as the repair route. But active contingency-buffer leakage means closing the incident invoice while leakage continues is not stable. System routes leakage-first, then symptom closure.
stress_point: symptom closure without leakage repair is structurally incomplete
